## What's Changed
* fix(ci): prevent auto-release from conflicting with manual releases by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus/pull/79
* fix(ci): restore goreleaser-action to v7 by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus/pull/81
* feat: read /etc/klaus/SOUL.md and append to system prompt by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus/pull/88
* Fix auto-release workflow YAML syntax error by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus/pull/90


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus/compare/v0.0.37...v0.0.38
